pathway_applied: Pathway 2: Neurologic deficit or red flag symptoms

Red flag symptoms including cauda equina concern

criteria_evaluation.explanation: Multiple cauda equina red flags are documented.

rationale: Red flag presentation consistent with cauda equina concern. Pathway 2 applies; routine conservative-therapy criteria are bypassed. Escalate for urgent clinical review rather than routine prior-auth processing.
suggested_next_steps: Escalate immediately for urgent clinical review
Do not apply routine 6-week conservative therapy requirements
Coordinate emergent imaging per clinical protocol
